channel.title: GE — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on GE (GE Aerospace) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED GE (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added GE in Q4 2025 · 18.2% of portfolio. Building the aerospace/defense position further.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Chris Hohn)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: TRIMMED GE (-16%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) trimmed GE in Q2 2025 · 0.7% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED GE (+8%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added GE in Q2 2025 · 17.4% of portfolio. Building GE Aerospace.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Chris Hohn)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED GE (+12%) · Q4 2024

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED GE (+6%) · Q1 2024
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added GE in Q1 2024 · 13.5% of portfolio. GE Aerospace early add.
